name: Walnut Chicken with Ham
recipeIngredient: 2 slices Luncheon ham, sliced into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice and prepare all ingredients. Toast the walnuts.
2. Marinate the chicken in wine, soya sauce, and salt for about 5 minutes.
3. Heat oil in a wok until it reaches smoking point. Stir fry the chicken and onions together for 3 minutes. Add peas and water chestnuts, stirring, then cover the wok and cook for another 3 minutes, lifting the cover twice to stir the ingredients.
4. Mix in the ham and walnuts. NOTE: If desired, almonds or cashews can be substituted for walnuts, or nuts may be omitted altogether.
